# Order Tracking

At Acme Shop, customers receive a unique tracking number and a link to the carrier's website via email after their order has shipped. Tracking can also be accessed through the "My Orders" section in the customer's account. Typically, tracking information becomes available within 24-48 hours post-shipment, though updates may be delayed due to carrier processing. For international orders, tracking availability may vary based on the carrier and destination, and expedited shipping options are available for faster processing and updates.

[Source: shipping_options.md#order-tracking]
